form.formComment: At the latest run 2nd of 9 at Vaal on March 26 over 1450m, on a slow track; long-neck behind Shoreybomba carrying 60kg at $9.50. The start before that 6th of 13 at Vaal on January 24 over 1200m, 9 len behind Stoneywood carrying 60kg at $11. Nice effort last time so worth following up.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Stronger Class FS(3). At the latest run 2nd of 9 at Vaal on March 26 over 1450m, on a slow track; long-neck behind Shoreybomba carrying 60kg at $9.50. The start before that 6th of 13 at Vaal on January 24 over 1200m, 9 len behind Stoneywood carrying 60kg at $11. Nice effort last time so worth following up.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Slow into stride and raced green throughout.

form.formComment: Third-up today. First-up 2nd in a small field at Vaal on February 24 over 1000m, 2.75 len behind Mrs Stormiatrix carrying 60kg at $6. Last start 6th of 9 at Vaal on March 26 over 1450m, on a slow track; 6 len behind Shoreybomba with 60kg at $26. Cannot be ruled out despite a moderate effort last time.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Stronger Class FS(3). Third-up today. First-up 2nd in a small field at Vaal on February 24 over 1000m, 2.75 len behind Mrs Stormiatrix carrying 60kg at $6. Last start 6th of 9 at Vaal on March 26 over 1450m, on a slow track; 6 len behind Shoreybomba with 60kg at $26. Cannot be ruled out despite a moderate effort last time.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: At the 400m, carried out by Wispinthewillow.
Jumped inwards leaving the stalls. Shortly after the start, bumped Luwak.

form.formComment: Second run back. Comes off a 61-day let-up. First-up after two months 4th of 10 at Turffontein Standside on February 7 over 1400m, 8 len behind Fire Storm with 60kg at $5.50. Previously second-up 5th of 19 at Turffontein Standside on November 29 over 1160m, 9 len behind Splittheeights with 59kg at $41. Strong winning chance.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Weaker Class FS(-2.5). Second run back. Comes off a 61-day let-up. First-up after two months 4th of 10 at Turffontein Standside on February 7 over 1400m, 8 len behind Fire Storm with 60kg at $5.50. Previously second-up 5th of 19 at Turffontein Standside on November 29 over 1160m, 9 len behind Splittheeights with 59kg at $41. Strong winning chance.

form.formComment: Most recently second last of 7 at Turffontein Standside on April 4 over 1400m, 10 len behind One Of Those Days carrying 60kg at $101. Before that 6th of 9 at this track on March 19 over 1800m, 6 len behind Terrence with 60kg at $26. Better than that recent ordinary performance suggests.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Stronger Class FS(6.5). Most recently second last of 7 at Turffontein Standside on April 4 over 1400m, 10 len behind One Of Those Days carrying 60kg at $101. Before that 6th of 9 at this track on March 19 over 1800m, 6 len behind Terrence with 60kg at $26. Better than that recent ordinary performance suggests.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Between the 300m and 200m, carried in by Indian Spice.

form.formComment: Third-up today. First-up ran last of 12 at Vaal on January 22 over 2000m, 30 len behind Culturati with 60kg at $51. Second run from a spell ran last of 9 at this track on March 19 over 1800m, 30 len behind Terrence carrying 60kg at $126. Prefer to watch at this stage.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Stronger Class FS(1.5). Third-up today. First-up ran last of 12 at Vaal on January 22 over 2000m, 30 len behind Culturati with 60kg at $51. Second run from a spell ran last of 9 at this track on March 19 over 1800m, 30 len behind Terrence carrying 60kg at $126. Prefer to watch at this stage.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Commenced to give ground to the field from the 800m.
Jockey C Murray did not persevere with his riding from the 300m.
